_doc: Plugin-shipped LSP servers (per code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference §LSP servers, 2026). Provides real-time type/diagnostic information to the agent so detectors fire on actual semantic info, not regex. Both servers are optional — they activate only when the corresponding language is detected in the project. Falls back silently if the LSP binary is not on PATH.

servers.name: typescript-language-server
servers._use: Drives g-ts-006 (no-any), g-ts-007 (strict), g-ts-005 (eqeqeq) when available with full type info.

servers.name: pyright
servers._use: Drives g-py-006 (type hints), g-py-007 (mypy --strict equivalent) when available.
